case_title: USAA GENERAL INDEMNITY COMPANY VS. BARTOLO PUAC ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE APR-08-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-01-2020 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 64425520), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF USAA GENERAL INDEMNITY COMPANY SERVED NOV-06-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-06-2019 AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, BARTOLO

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-19-2020 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S), OR FILE NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF USAA GENERAL INDEMNITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, BARTOLO DOES 1-40, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-04-2020 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-30-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-10-2020
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-14-2020 CONTINUED TO SEP-29-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-29-2020 CONTINUED TO DEC-01-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100113315) AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, BARTOLO

DECLARATION RE:SIGNED ATTORNEY 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100113315) FILED BY PLAINTIFF USAA GENERAL INDEMNITY COMPANY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF USAA GENERAL INDEMNITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PUAC, BARTOLO $7,440.09 PRINCIPAL, $474.28 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,214.37, SEE SCANNED DOC
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100103197) AS TO DEFENDANT PUAC, BARTOLO
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAR-04-2020 CONTINUED TO APR-08-2020 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100113315) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-40, INCLUSIVE
